mapper.select: SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_date, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date FROM ddd_care c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_status = 'open' AND ( c.care_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY c.care_date ASC
SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_date, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date, c.care_post FROM ddd_care c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_number = #{care_number}

SELECT COUNT(a.apply_number) || '/' || c.care_recruit AS apply_status FROM ddd_care c LEFT JOIN ddd_care_apply a ON c.care_number = a.care_number WHERE c.care_number = #{care_number} GROUP BY c.care_recruit
SELECT c.apply_number, u.user_number, u.user_name, u.user_nickname, u.user_phone FROM ddd_care_apply c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_number = #{care_number}
